name: Chocolate Chip Macadamia Crunch Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. With an electric mixer, beat Crisco, sugar, brown sugar, eggs, vanilla, and buttermilk for 3-5 minutes until very light and fluffy.
2. In a separate bowl, mix flour, oatmeal, baking soda, and salt.
3. By hand, add the Crisco mixture to the dry ingredients and stir well.
4. Add chocolate chips and nuts and stir by hand.
5. Refrigerate dough for at least 30 minutes until firm.
6. Drop dough by tablespoon, about 2 inches apart, onto a greased insulated cookie sheet.
7. Bake in a preheated oven at 325°F for 16-18 minutes until cookies are light golden brown.
8. Cool cookies on the baking sheet for 1 minute before transferring to a cooling rack.
